attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.MCC_HEADER_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.PROJECT_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.TASK_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.SO_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.SO_LINE_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.SKU_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.THEATER_SEGMENT, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.AMOUNT, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.MCC_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.MCC_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.MCC_STATUS, TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.MCC_URL USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) MCC_URL, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.HEADER_STATUS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.ORG_ID, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.SUBMITTED_BY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.DEAL_ID, TRANSLATE(STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.COMMENTS USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) COMMENTS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.REV_REC_METHODOLOGY, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.MILESTONE_START_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.MILESTONE_END_DATE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.MEMO_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.MEMO_LINE_NUMBER, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.LINE_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.RELEASED_FLAG, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.DCP_MCC_STATUS, STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.SO_DEAL_ID 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS,
(
select MCC_HEADER_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS
minus
select MCC_HEADER_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS
) ACM
where 
 ACM.MCC_HEADER_ID = STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.MCC_HEADER_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_XXCAS_PRJ_MCC_CAPTURE_HDRS)
